items.title: Hungary Poses Unexpected Hurdle to Europe’s 90-Billion Euro Loan to Ukraine
items.description: While the delay may prove to be procedural, Hungary signaled that it could cause problems as the European Union works to send money to Ukraine.

items.title: Johannes Dale-Skjevdal of Norway Wins Biathlon Mass Start
items.description: Johannes Dale-Skjevdal of Norway hit all 20 of his shots to win the gold medal in the mass start event.

items.title: India’s Hindu Right Seems Unstoppable. This City Shows How.
items.description: Muslims make up a majority in Sambhal, but after deadly clashes over a mosque, they say they the arms of the state are now stifling them.
